title: Rose Rainy Blue Bare Root Climbing Rose
features: Rainy Blue: Rainy Blue is a climbing rose bush that grows to around 200cm tall . Its blooms are a beautiful lilac-blue, about 7-8 cm (3 inches) in size, with a strong, fruity fragrance that lingers in the air. This rose’s unique color and captivating scent make it a standout addition to any floral arrangemen
